Meta.title: Patent-Scan — check your invention's uniqueness
Meta.description: AI portal for patent clearance: Russia, US, Europe, Japan, China in one minute.

Common.tagline: Check your invention's uniqueness in a minute

hero.badge: AI · Russia · US · Europe · Japan · China
hero.title: Check your invention's uniqueness before visiting a patent attorney
hero.subtitle: Drop a description — AI builds the queries, hits 3 patent databases in parallel, returns a structured report with a recommendation.
hero.disclaimer: Not legal advice. The report is a reference point: iterate, file, or consult an expert.

steps.title: Describe your invention
steps.body: Plain text in any language and jargon. AI extracts keywords and IPC classes automatically.

steps.title: Parallel search
steps.body: A single Rospatent PatSearch index covering Russia (RU, SU, CIS), US, Europe, Japan, China. Duplicates merged by publication ID.

steps.title: Report & recommendation
steps.body: Overview, key analogs with overlaps and differences, geography, trends, final recommendation. PDF + web view.

items.title: Up to 30 relevant patents
items.body: Titles, years, countries, IPC codes, clickable links to the original records in each database.

items.title: Analysis of 5–10 key analogs
items.body: For each: similarity (High/Medium/Low), what overlaps, what differs from your invention.

items.title: Classification by direction
items.body: Patents grouped by technical approach — you see which directions are already taken.

items.title: Final recommendation
items.body: High/Medium/Low uniqueness + the concrete next step: iterate, file, or visit a patent attorney.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.subtitle: Only official open databases. We never fabricate data.

items.name: Rospatent PatSearch
items.meta: A single worldwide patent index · Russia (RU, SU, CIS), US, Europe, Japan, China

ctaBlock.title: Ready to check your invention?
ctaBlock.subtitle: Uploading a description takes 1 minute. The report is ready in 1–2 minutes.

Search.title: Describe your invention
Search.subtitle: The more detail you provide, the sharper the search. Russian, English, and technical jargon all work.
Search.textareaPlaceholder: For example: An automatic plastic waste sorting system using infrared spectral analysis and neural network classification by polymer type…
Search.clarifySubtitle: AI will ask a few questions to narrow the search. Answers are optional.

questions.q: What is the key technical technique?
questions.placeholder: e.g. neural network, spectral analysis, mechanical gripping

questions.q: What distinguishes it from known analogs?

Search.loading: Building queries and polling patent databases…
Search.loadingHint: Usually takes 1–2 minutes. Please keep this tab open.
Search.loadingGateHint: Checking technical features, application area and the problem solved.
loadingPhrases: Extracting key features and IPC classes from your description.
Composing parallel queries — Russian and English.
Polling Rospatent PatSearch — Russia, USSR, CIS.
Looking into US, European, Japanese and Chinese patents.
Sifting hundreds of candidates and merging duplicates by ID.
Cross-checking each hit against every feature of your invention.
Picking the closest analogs — what overlaps, what differs.
Verifying every link — only confirmed sources will reach you.
Calibrating the uniqueness verdict and marking the limits.
Assembling a structured report with a clear recommendation.
Search.gateReason: Description accepted: {reason}. Skipping follow-up and starting the search.

Report.title: Uniqueness check report
Report.subtitle: Preview version of the report. A reference point, not a legal opinion.
Report.emptyBody: None of the sources returned relevant publications for your description. Try rephrasing — add key terms or the application area.
Report.errorBody: One of the services returned an error. Please retry or adjust the description.
Report.missingBody: Looks like you opened this page directly. Start from the invention description.
Report.coverageSubtitle: The search ran across global patent databases — not just Russia.
Report.coverageBases: Russia (RU + SU); CIS; United States (US); Europe (EP); China (CN); Japan (JP)
Report.coverageNote: Coverage depth is the same on every plan, including the free one.
Report.verdictCaptionHigh: No close analogs found in the databases we checked. This is not a guarantee of patentability — see what we did not check below.
Report.verdictCaptionMedium: There are partially similar patents. Patentability depends on how substantial your solution's differences are.
Report.verdictCaptionLow: Close analogs were found. High risk of rejection without substantial refinement. We recommend a review with a patent attorney before filing.
Report.notCheckedItems: Scientific papers, dissertations, conference proceedings (non-patent sources).|Applications filed but not yet published (publication lag — up to 18 months).|This is a novelty prior-art search — not a freedom-to-operate (FTO) check, trademarks, or industrial designs.|Completeness depends on how precisely the invention is described.
Report.disclaimerBody: This report is based on automated analysis of open patent databases and is not a legal opinion. It does not replace the expertise of a patent attorney. Make the final decision to file after consulting a specialist.
Report.deepBody: The same results, analysed in more depth on a frontier model from the Anthropic lab: a claim-by-claim breakdown of the invention's features and distant, non-obvious analogs. A comparable review at a patent firm starts at 50,000 ₽ and takes 7–10 days.
Report.deepBullet1: Breakdown by distinguishing features: what is already patented and what is new
Report.deepBullet2: Distant analogs that the standard pass filters out
Report.deepFreeHint: Your first review is free with registration.
deepLoadingPhrases: Handing the results off to the Anthropic lab.
Breaking the claim down into essential distinguishing features.
Matching each feature against the retrieved analogs one by one.
Hunting distant analogs — the ones the first pass usually filters out.
Cross-checking the two engines: where they agree, where they diverge.
Marking risk areas and non-obvious limits in the claim.
Calibrating confidence by how well the two reviews converge.
Assembling the feature breakdown: what's new, what's already covered.
Drafting the recommendation and the parts of the claim to strengthen.
Compiling the in-depth verdict with real source links.
Report.crossCheckTitle: The in-depth review refined the verdict
Report.crossCheckBody: The initial screening rated it “{fast}”, while the feature-by-feature review rated it “{deep}”. A shift like this is a signal of uncertainty — we recommend reviewing the result with a patent attorney before filing.
Report.deepUsedBody: One free in-depth review is available per account. Paid access will appear later.
Report.deepErrorMsg: Could not complete the in-depth review. Please try again later.

IndustrialUsage.lockedDefault: This section shows the patent owner, products and competitors. Available on the Team plan and above.
IndustrialUsage.errorPipeline: Sources temporarily unavailable, try again later.
IndustrialUsage.productsEmpty: No public sources linking this patent to a specific product were found.
IndustrialUsage.competitorsEmpty: No public data about competitors in this niche was found.
IndustrialUsage.disclaimer: This map is auto-generated from public sources. It does not replace legal analysis and should be verified by an industry expert.

Landscape.title: Patent landscape
Landscape.subtitle: Describe a technology area — we build a patent map: key directions, geography, timeline, trends.
Landscape.textareaPlaceholder: For example: Processing of low-grade tin concentrates: pyrometallurgy, hydrometallurgy, cassiterite beneficiation, tin recovery from slags and secondary feedstocks…
Landscape.loadingHint: Usually takes 1–2 minutes. Please keep this tab open.

LandscapeReport.title: Patent landscape
LandscapeReport.missingBody: Looks like you opened this page directly. Start from a topic description.
LandscapeReport.emptyBody: Patent databases returned no relevant publications for this topic. Try rephrasing — add key terms or the application area.

login.title: Sign in to Patent-Scan
login.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send a sign-in link. No password needed.
login.consent: I accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, and consent to the processing of my personal data.
login.consentRequired: Please confirm your consent to continue.
login.marketingConsent: I agree to receive informational emails from Patent-Scan: product news, patent-search tips, customer cases. You can unsubscribe via the link in each email.
login.successBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it in the same browser — you'll be signed in automatically.

errors.generic: Couldn't send the link. Please try again.
errors.disposable_email: Disposable email addresses aren't supported. Please use a regular email.
errors.no_mx_record: This domain can't receive mail. Please check the address.
errors.captcha_missing: Bot check failed to load. Please refresh the page.
errors.captcha_failed: Bot check failed. Please refresh the page.
errors.otp_send_failed: Email service temporarily unavailable. Try again in a minute.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts from this IP. Try again tomorrow.

callback.errorBody: The link may have expired or already been used. Please try again.

Quota.title: Monthly limit reached
Quota.bodySearch: You've used {used} of {limit} invention checks this month on the {tier} plan.
Quota.bodyLandscape: You've used {used} of {limit} patent landscapes this month on the {tier} plan.
Quota.resetNote: The limit resets at the start of next month — checks will be available again then.

tier.descFree: Free trial: 1 novelty search, 1 landscape, 1 Deep Analysis — for the lifetime of the account.
tier.descStarter: Subscription for occasional checks: 20 novelty searches per month + full landscape access.
tier.descTeam: Team subscription: unlimited searches, 1 review per month included, Industrial Usage by default.
tier.descEnterprise: Enterprise plan: unlimited everything, 2 reviews per month, priority support.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Account summary, available quotas and recent requests.
overview.cycleFree: No expiry. Quotas refresh every calendar month.
overview.cycleSubscription: Subscription active. Management is in the Billing section.
overview.emptyRecent: No requests yet. Start with a novelty search or landscape on your topic.
overview.promoTitle: Get the full Patent-Scan on the Team plan
overview.promoBody: Unlimited searches, literature reviews on demand, Industrial Usage for every key patent — all included.

history.title: Request history
history.subtitle: All your searches and reviews in one table. Open, download PDF or rerun with edits.
history.loadError: Failed to load history. Reload the page.
history.empty: No history yet. Start your first novelty search — free on the trial plan.
history.emptyFiltered: Nothing matches the filters. Reset filters or change the date range.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Personal details, preferences and account controls.
profile.phoneHelper: For support outreach on complex requests.
profile.emailHelper: Changing email is a separate confirmation flow.
profile.industrialBody: Include a commercial market-map block for top patents in novelty reports: assignee, product lines, competitors, licensing.
profile.industrialAvailable: Available on your plan. On by default.
profile.emailReadyBody: Send an email when a literature review is ready. Usually takes 1-3 business days.
profile.emailReadyNote: The receipt-confirmation email always sends — it is a protected transactional message.
profile.passwordlessNote: Sign-in is by magic link sent to your email. The account has no password.
profile.deleteWarningBody:
Once deleted:
— Cabinet access goes away immediately
— All your reports and reviews become inaccessible
— Active subscription is cancelled without refund for the paid period
— Data is fully removed within 30 days

Restore within 30 days — email support@patent-scan.com.

billing.title: Billing & subscription
billing.subtitle: Paid plans launch with the public release.
billing.stubBody1: Subscription and payment management will be available once paid plans go live.
billing.stubBody2: Need a paid plan today? Email support@patent-scan.com and we'll set up the subscription manually.

LiteratureReview.title: Literature review
LiteratureReview.explainer: Industry-tech overview of your topic: producers, technologies, competitors, sources.

intake.lead: We gather scientific publications, patents and open industry sources and synthesise a structured report with tables of producers, technologies and competitors.
intake.explainer: Industry-tech overview of your topic: producers, technologies, competitors, sources. Not an academic literature review and not a formal patentability study.
intake.trust: No invented data: every statement in the report is backed by a real source URL.
intake.topicPlaceholder: e.g. "Antimony oxide (Sb₂O₃) processing technologies: producers, equipment, patent landscape in RU and CN for 2015-2026"
intake.topicHelper: Describe the topic as you would for a technologist. 50-500 characters.
intake.industryHelper: Drives the choice of industry databases and patent classifications (IPC/CPC).
intake.regionsHelper: Narrows the geography of producers, plants and patent jurisdictions. Select multiple.
intake.periodHelper: Includes publications, patents and materials within the selected period. 10-15 years is usually optimal.
intake.hypothesesPlaceholder: e.g. "Interested in off-gas treatment technologies in copper smelters; hypothesis — flash furnaces dominate in EU/NA".
intake.hypothesesHelper: If you already have hypotheses or specific sub-questions, add them — the review will specifically check and highlight them.
intake.submitDisclaimer: By clicking the button you agree to the <terms>terms of use</terms> and <privacy>data processing policy</privacy>.

errors.topic_too_short: Too short. Minimum 50 characters so the search has enough context.
errors.topic_too_long: Over the limit. Trim to 500 characters or move detail to «Hypotheses».
errors.invalid_industry: Pick an industry — it affects the source choice.
errors.period_in_future: End year cannot be in the future.
errors.period_reversed: Start year must be earlier than end year.
errors.period_too_wide: Period too wide (>50 years). Narrow to 5-30 years.
errors.quota_exceeded: No reviews left in your plan this month. Go to the account to see options.
errors.unauthorized: Sign in to run a review.
errors.email_not_verified: Confirm your email — we sent a link at signup.
errors.insert_failed: Couldn't create the request. Try again in a minute.
errors.network: Couldn't send the request. Check your internet and retry.
errors.generic: Temporary service-side error. Try again in a minute.

tierLocked.title: Literature review is available on the Team plan
tierLocked.body: Your current plan is «{tier}». Literature reviews are included with Team (1/mo) and Enterprise (2/mo). Research institutes can request a complimentary demo review.
tierLocked.benefit1: Up to 80 verified sources: scientific publications, patents, industry reports
tierLocked.benefit2: Comparative tables of producers and technologies — ready for R&D planning
tierLocked.benefit3: Strategic insights: dominant players, risks, trends, regulation

processing.subtitle: Request #{id} accepted. Expected ready time — 1-3 business days.
processing.missingId: Request ID is missing. Use the link from the email or from your request history.
processing.notFound: Request not found or not yours.
processing.whatNext1: We process the request and email the ready review to you within 1-3 business days.
processing.whatNext2: The review will also appear in your account under «Request history».
processing.whatNext3: If you need a follow-up or a rerun with edits — one click from the history.
processing.closeWindowHint: You can close this tab — processing continues in the background.
processing.doneBody: Request #{id} processed. Download the report or open it in your account.
processing.errorBody: An error occurred during processing. Money/quota refunded. You can retry the request.

meta.title: For institutes & R&D — complimentary demo review
meta.description: A free demo literature review on a topic of your choice for research institutes and R&D centres. Delivered within 24 hours, in our Team-tier format.

hero.badge: For R&D centres, institutes, and design organisations
hero.title: A literature review on your topic — on us
hero.subtitle: We deliver a Team-tier literature review (14,900 ₽ value) on one topic of your choice. Turnaround — up to 24 hours after we agree on the brief, plus a 30-minute call to discuss findings. No commitment — if the format works, we can discuss further collaboration.

items.title: Full literature review in a unified format
items.body: Six sections: technology landscape and classification, comparison tables by producers, pros/cons of approaches, conclusions, sources, caveats. Identical to our paid product.

items.title: Comparable across topics
items.body: All reviews follow the same template, so 10 topics fit in one comparison table — useful for R&D planning and prioritisation.

items.title: 30-minute call on findings
items.body: We walk through what we found, what didn't make it in and why, what stayed out of scope. By the end you'll know where this tool fits in your workflow.

items.title: 44-FZ / 223-FZ — separate pre-sales track
items.body: For state-funded procurement we align scope, pricing and procurement-procedure details up front.

items.title: Request
items.body: Fill out the form below: organisation, contacts, topic. We respond within 24 hours.

items.title: Brief and review
items.body: We agree on the brief, then deliver the review within 24 hours — PDF plus an online version.

items.title: Findings call
items.body: 30 minutes on Zoom/Telemost: what we found, what's in focus, what isn't covered. Then we decide on next steps.

form.title: Demo review request
form.subtitle: Required fields are marked with an asterisk. We respond within 24 hours.
form.phoneHint: Optional — if you'd rather discuss by voice
form.topicPlaceholder: For example: antimony concentrate processing technologies in Russia and China, patent landscape over the past 10 years, key producers and their approaches.
form.topicHint: Describe the topic as concretely as possible: domain, geographic focus, time range, anything we should pay particular attention to.
form.consent: I accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, and consent to the processing of my personal data.
form.consentRequired: Confirm consent to submit the request.
form.marketingConsent: I'd like to receive informational messages from Patent-Scan: product news, case studies. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.
form.successBody: Thanks. We've sent a confirmation to your email and will get back to you within 24 hours.

errors.generic: Couldn't submit the request. Please try again or email support@patent-scan.com.
errors.invalid_format: Please make sure all required fields are filled correctly (email, INN — digits only).
errors.captcha_missing: Couldn't pass the bot check. Please refresh the page.
errors.captcha_failed: Bot check failed. Please try again.
errors.send_failed: We can't send the request right now. Please email support@patent-scan.com directly.
errors.rate_limited: Too many submissions from this IP. Please try again in a few minutes.
